summary: Re-verification of the 3 HIGH severity bugs from iteration_3.json. All 3 bugs are CONFIRMED FIXED in the live preview environment (https://two-chamber-test.preview.emergentagent.com).
verified_passing: BUG 1 FIXED: /ads has exactly 1 meta[name=robots] tag with content='noindex, follow'. Static default removed from public/index.html.
BUG 1 control: / (homepage) has exactly 1 meta[name=robots] tag with content='index, follow, max-image-preview:large' (set by Landing's PageHead).
BUG 2 FIXED: /about body innerText does NOT contain 'US patent application' (case-insensitive). 'filed a US patent' is also absent. 'patent pending' still appears (preserved).

BUG 2 FIXED (JSON-LD): /about has 2 application/ld+json scripts; exactly 1 Person entity. Person.description = 'Inventor of the patent-pending Muk Buddy 2-chamber reusable wet/dry vac filter. 28+ years operating commercial floor and cleanup crews. Patent-pending status held by Floor Lord Industries.' — does NOT contain 'US patent application'.
BUG 3 FIXED: /blog/disposable-vs-reusable-shop-vac-bags/ byline reads 'By Jason Brouk' (visible in screenshot). 'By Muk Buddy' is absent.

BUG 3 FIXED: Author bio block 'Founder of Floor Lord Industries and inventor of Muk Buddy. 28 years doing floors — and still building the tools contractors wish already existed.' is present on the page.
BUG 3 preserved: YouTube embed still uses video ID 8wKa1mR66gk via https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/8wKa1mR66gk?rel=0.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 targeted bugs fixed; 17 previously-passing items not re-tested per instructions)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 HIGH severity bugs from iteration_3 are resolved in the live preview. The Express server is now correctly serving the per-route prerendered HTML (or react-helmet-async is rewriting meta correctly during hydration) — /ads, /, /about, and the affected blog post all show the expected values in the live DOM. No further action needed.
rca of the issue: All 3 fixes verified: (1) /ads now serves the prerendered build with noindex,follow and static default removed from public/index.html; (2) /about copy and Person JSON-LD description both rewritten to drop 'US patent application' while keeping 'patent pending'; (3) blog frontmatter author + author_bio restored and rebuilt via /app/scripts/build-blog.js.
